name: Hewlett-Packard's C++ SoftBench 5.0 -- A Powerful Platform for Professional Developers
alternateName: Aberdeen Group HP SoftBench 5.0 White Paper (1995)
description: Frictionless Data Package archiving Aberdeen Group's December 1995 executive white paper evaluating HP's C++ SoftBench 5.0 IDE for object-oriented software development. Contains structured observations, entity status tracking, and technology lifecycle assessments.

about.name: HP C++ SoftBench 5.0
about.releaseNotes: Version 5.0 released December 1995 adding Graphical Class Editor, CodeAdvisor, and enhanced SoftBench CM

distribution.name: entities.csv
distribution.description: Organizations and companies mentioned in the study with current status

distribution.name: technologies.csv
distribution.description: Technologies and products mentioned in the study with lifecycle status

distribution.name: observations.csv
distribution.description: Structured claims, findings, and analyst statements from the study

distribution.name: codes.csv
distribution.description: Reference codelist for controlled vocabulary values

isBasedOn.name: Hewlett-Packard's C++ SoftBench 5.0 -- A Powerful Platform for Professional Developers

variableMeasured.name: observation_type
variableMeasured.description: Type of analytical observation extracted from study

variableMeasured.name: entity_status
variableMeasured.description: Current corporate status of organizations mentioned in study

variableMeasured.name: tech_lifecycle_status
variableMeasured.description: Current lifecycle status of technologies mentioned in study
